comments.body: This update should lower memory requirements for linter. With the older version I saw 8.9GiB memory consumption. With the newer just 1.5GB.

One thing I don't understand: even without this PR there is a lint error:
```
conmon/cmd/conmon-config/conmon-config.go:33:13: unusedresult: result of fmt.Errorf call not used (govet)
                fmt.Errorf(err.Error())
```
however CI is not bothered by it.
